---
title: "Data Cleaning"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Set Up

```{r}
# Loading packages
library(blsAPI)
library(blscrapeR)
library(devtools)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

install_github("mikeasilva/blsAPI", force = TRUE)
```

## Variable Selection

```{r}
# For "Employed" Population
employment_data <- c(
  # Race
  "LNU02000003",  # White
  "LNU02000006",  # Black or African American
  "LNU02032183",  # Asian
  "LNU02000009",  # Other races

  # Ethnicity
  "LNU02032201",  # Hispanic or Latino
  "LNU02032202",  # Non-Hispanic

  # Gender
  "LNU02000001",  # Male
  "LNU02000002",  # Female

  # Industry
  "LNU04032227",  # Manufacturing
  "LNU04032241",  # Healthcare
  "LNU04032232",  # Construction
  "LNU04032216",  # Retail Trade
  "LNU04032244",  # Education and Health Services
  "LNU04032236",  # Professional and Business Services

  # Region
  "LNU02000005",  # Northeast
  "LNU02000006",  # Midwest
  "LNU02000007",  # South
  "LNU02000008",  # West

  # Education Level
  "LNU02027662",  # Less than high school diploma
  "LNU02027664",  # High school graduates, no college
  "LNU02027663",  # Some college or associate degree
  "LNU02027665"   # Bachelor’s degree or higher
)

start_year <- 2022
end_year <- 2024
employment_data <- bls_api(employment_data, startyear = start_year, endyear = end_year)

```

```{r}
# For "Unemployed" Population

unemployment_data <- c(
  # Race
  "LNU03000003",  # White
  "LNU03000006",  # Black or African American
  "LNU03032183",  # Asian
  "LNU03000009",  # Other races

  # Ethnicity
  "LNU03032201",  # Hispanic or Latino
  "LNU03032202",  # Non-Hispanic

  # Gender
  "LNU03000001",  # Male
  "LNU03000002",  # Female

  # Industry
  "LNU03032227",  # Manufacturing
  "LNU03032241",  # Healthcare
  "LNU03032232",  # Construction
  "LNU03032216",  # Retail Trade
  "LNU03032244",  # Education and Health Services
  "LNU03032236",  # Professional and Business Services
  
  # Region
  "LNU03000005",  # Northeast
  "LNU03000006",  # Midwest
  "LNU03000007",  # South
  "LNU03000008",  # West

  # Education Level
  "LNU03027662",  # Less than high school diploma
  "LNU03027664",  # High school graduates, no college
  "LNU03027663",  # Some college or associate degree
  "LNU03027665"   # Bachelor’s degree or higher
)

start_year <- 2022
end_year <- 2024
unemployment_data <- bls_api(unemployment_data, startyear = start_year, endyear = end_year)

```

```{r}
# "Employed": Convert dataset to wide format 
employment_data <- employment_data %>%
  select(year, period, seriesID, value) %>%  
  pivot_wider(names_from = seriesID, values_from = value) %>%  
  arrange(year, period) 

## View dataset
View(employment_data)

# "Unemployed": Convert dataset to wide format 

unemployment_data <- unemployment_data %>%
  select(year, period, seriesID, value) %>%  
  pivot_wider(names_from = seriesID, values_from = value) %>%  
  arrange(year, period) 

## View dataset
View(unemployment_data)

```

```{r}
# "Employed": Change time data from month to quarter
employment_data <- employment_data %>%
  mutate(
    quarter = case_when(
      period %in% c("M01", "M02", "M03") ~ "Q1",
      period %in% c("M04", "M05", "M06") ~ "Q2",
      period %in% c("M07", "M08", "M09") ~ "Q3",
      period %in% c("M10", "M11", "M12") ~ "Q4"
    )
  )

## View the modified dataset with the new column
View(employment_data)

# "Unemployed": Change time data from month to quarter
unemployment_data <- unemployment_data %>%
  mutate(
    quarter = case_when(
      period %in% c("M01", "M02", "M03") ~ "Q1",
      period %in% c("M04", "M05", "M06") ~ "Q2",
      period %in% c("M07", "M08", "M09") ~ "Q3",
      period %in% c("M10", "M11", "M12") ~ "Q4"
    )
  )

## View the modified dataset with the new column
View(unemployment_data)
```
